description: Design a high-solidity wind pump rotor in QBlade using a NACA 4415 airfoil with a 360-degree polar extrapolation. The rotor must feature 12 blades with a 2.5m radius and a 0.3m hub. Optimize the blade geometry for a Tip Speed Ratio (TSR) of 2.0 and perform a BEM simulation using a TSR sweep from 0.5 to 4.0 with a 0.1 step. Export the Power Coefficient (Cp) graph data to /home/ga/Documents/wind_pump_performance.txt and save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/projects/wind_pump.wpa. Additionally, record the maximum Cp value and its corresponding TSR in a summary file at /home/ga/Documents/design_summary.txt.
